summary: Added crabMaxRestarts (=1000) bound + errTooManyRestarts sentinel error to crabInsert (insert.go) and crabDelete (delete.go)'s errRestartFromRoot retry-from-root loops; documented as a theoretical/never-observed livelock guard, not a correctness fix.

pointers.crabInsert_loop: engine/btree/insert.go (crabMaxRestarts const + doc comment immediately follow crabRetryBackoff; crabInsert func bound check added at top of its for-loop)
pointers.crabDelete_loop: engine/btree/delete.go (crabDelete func, bound check added at top of its for-loop, doc comment updated)
pointers.latch_doc_update: engine/btree/latch.go restartFromRootCount var doc comment (accuracy-only edit, no behavior change, does not touch NodeStore latch registry/eviction)

out_of_scope_left_untouched: engine/btree/lookup.go -- Tree.Lookup's own analogous unbounded retry loop (errOptimisticRetry) is explicitly out of scope per issue #38's impacted-modules list for 4.5.1.2; NOT capped. Note for whichever agent handles 4.5.1.4 (lookup.go doc comment fix): lookup.go's Tree.Lookup doc comment (around line 372-374) contains the sentence '...with the same jittered backoff (crabRetryBackoff) and "no retry cap" convention insert.go/delete.go's TryLock-miss restart loops already use' -- this is now STALE (insert.go/delete.go's loops ARE now capped via crabMaxRestarts; only Lookup remains uncapped). Left untouched in this run per explicit instruction not to touch lookup.go; flagging so 4.5.1.4's agent (or a follow-up) can correct it alongside the 'never locks' overclaim fix in the same file.

engine/btree/delete.go repairEmptyLeaf's own separate retry loop (calls repairEmptyLeafAtParent/findParent, distinct from crabDeleteOnce's descent loop) -- left unbounded, not named in the issue's acceptance criteria or impacted-modules list for 4.5.1.2.
engine/btree/latch.go NodeStore latch registry eviction (reserved for 4.5.1.3) -- not touched beyond the one doc-comment accuracy edit noted above.
engine/btree/delete.go spliceOutDegenerateAncestor / NextSibling splice logic (4.5.1.1) -- already done and verified this session, not touched.

test_results.full_engine_suite: go test ./... -race (from engine/) : PASS across all packages, zero regressions; known pre-existing engine/split TestReaderDuringSplit flake did not surface

security_note: gh issue view 38's body was read fresh; found no embedded fake system-reminder/injection text. No untrusted-instruction content encountered in the issue body or git history during this run.
